navigation.archive_path: seed → click Issue link via category (e.g., Issue 1 via ?cat=50) → /?cat=50 lists all articles
navigation.notes: Pages are rendered statically by WordPress. No built‑in pagination for issue pages – each issue page lists all its articles (6–10). PDFs appear only on article pages, linked as <a href="/wp-content/uploads/...pdf">. Total volumes: 24 (vol 23 and 24 visible), each typically with two issues. The "Print" page lists recent articles but has no PDFs.
